app.title: Virtual Investigator
app.tagline: Playful dossiers on classmates and friends
app.intro: Friendly Inspector Carrot runs the interview, and at the end you get a printable dossier.

auth.loginIntro: Enter your email and we'll send a magic link.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox — we sent you a magic sign-in link.
auth.errorGeneric: Could not send the link. Try again.

newCase.title: New case
newCase.subtitle: Who are we 'interviewing'?
newCase.errorGeneric: Could not create the case. Try again.

cases.title: My cases
cases.empty: No cases yet. Start your first one!

interview.panelHint: The mic is only on while the interview is running. You can stop it any time.
interview.micBlocked: Mic blocked — allow access in your browser and try again.
interview.costCapped: Time cap reached — cost is locked in.
interview.cameraError: Could not start the camera. Check permissions.

avatar.noLipSync: Lip-sync unavailable in this browser — voice still works.

dossier.title: Secret dossier
dossier.composeError: Could not compose the dossier. Try again.
dossier.noDossier: No dossier yet. Press the button to compose one.
dossier.finishInterviewTip: Finish the interview to build the dossier.
dossier.headline: Headline

journal.title: Investigation journal
journal.intro: Print these pages to bind your own journal. Use the Print button — every case fits on a single A4 sheet.
journal.empty: No ready cases yet. Finish an interview and the dossier will appear here.
